div.div:
> You entered $USERINPUT in the form. Your input was processed as a string. Function ElahnaWeb.FileContentController.countletters calculated that $USERINPUT has $VALUE letters.
> Building APIs, template systems, and design components with Elahna is very easy and a lot of fun. For most use cases, you probably only need to modify lib/elahna_web/controllers/file_content_controller.ex
> Define endpoints in the router (lib/elahna_web/router.ex), then write custom controller actions to define the response for that request. That's it.
> lib/elahna_web/controllers/file_content_controller.ex contains helpful functions for processing Markdown to HTML (using Earmark). You can see it in action by rendering README.md of this project directly to the frontend. It contains more in-depth documentation.
